description: The company WordPress site is currently down and displaying a 'critical error' after a recent batch of plugin updates, leaving the dashboard inaccessible. Restore site functionality by removing the 'broken-analytics' plugin directory located in /var/www/html/wordpress. Perform database maintenance by deleting all SPAM comments and all POST REVISIONS, ensuring approved comments and published posts remain intact. Publish a new blog post titled 'System Outage Resolved' with a message confirming the site is back online.
